title: Booking a Day Tour
description: Ask the hotel concierge to book a half-day city tour. Negotiate timing and price.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Welcome. How can I help you today?

templates.text: I'd like to book a city tour for tomorrow morning if possible.
templates.hint_zh: 我想預訂明天早上的城市觀光,如果還有的話。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. We have a half-day walking tour at 9 AM and a bus tour at 10.

templates.text: What's the difference, mostly the pace?
templates.hint_zh: 差別在哪?主要是步調嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: The walking tour goes deeper into three neighborhoods. The bus tour covers more ground but feels rushed.

templates.text: Walking sounds better. What about the price?
templates.hint_zh: 聽起來步行那團比較好,那價錢呢?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Forty-five dollars per person, lunch is on your own.

templates.text: Any discount for two of us?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I can knock off ten percent if you book today. So eighty-one for two.

templates.text: Deal. Can I pay at the end of my stay?
templates.hint_zh: 成交。可以退房時一起結嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. I'll add it to your room. Meet me here at 8:45.

templates.text: Perfect. Thanks for setting it up.
templates.hint_zh: 太好了,謝謝你幫忙安排。
